introDialogue.speaker: شنل‌قرمزی
introDialogue.text: لرد تمپوس بدجنس تمام خاطرات داستان مرا به هم ریخته! کمک کن درستش کنیم؛ بیا شروع کنیم!

introDialogue.speaker: شنل‌قرمزی
introDialogue.text: مادر دارد سبدی برای مادربزرگ بیمار آماده می‌کند. کمک کن تا کارهایم را پیش از رفتن مرتب کنم!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: انجام شد! مادر سبد را می‌دهد، تو شنل را می‌پوشی و راه می‌افتی.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: شنل‌قرمزی
rewardDialogue_success.text: هورا! یادت باشد: همیشه قبل از خروج از خانه کارهایت را مرتب کنی.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: انجام شد! مادر سبد را می‌دهد، تو شنل را می‌پوشی و راه می‌افتی.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: شنل‌قرمزی
rewardDialogue_retry.text: با تلاش دوباره موفق شدی! همیشه پیش از خروج از خانه آماده شو.

introDialogue.speaker: Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: I got distracted picking flowers in the woods! Help me put this walk in order.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: Here we go! You walked, spotted the flowers, stopped to pick them, and wandered off.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Perfect! Getting distracted can make you lose your way.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Here we go! You walked, spotted the flowers, stopped to pick them, and wandered off.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Good job trying again! Getting distracted can make you lose your way.

introDialogue.speaker: Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: A curious wolf stops me on the path! Shall we put our meeting in order?

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: All set! The wolf comes closer, talks to you, and finds out where Grandmother lives.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: What a team! Always be careful around strangers.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: All set! The wolf comes closer, talks to you, and finds out where Grandmother lives.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Together we did it! Always be careful around strangers.

introDialogue.speaker: Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: The wolf runs to Grandmother's house to get there first! Put his actions in order.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: In order: the wolf runs through the trees, sees the cottage, and knocks on the door.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Perfect! The wolf was clever—shortcuts can hide nasty tricks.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: In order: the wolf runs through the trees, sees the cottage, and knocks on the door.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Great job trying again! Shortcuts can hide nasty tricks.

introDialogue.speaker: Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: The wolf dresses up as Grandmother and waits in bed! Put his actions in order.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: All in order! He takes the clothes, puts on the nightcap, and slips under the covers.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Amazing, Lumi! Things aren't always what they seem.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: All in order! He takes the clothes, puts on the nightcap, and slips under the covers.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Never give up—we did it! Things aren't always what they seem.

introDialogue.speaker: Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: I reach Grandmother's house and hear a strange voice! Put my entrance in order.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: Done: you open the door, listen carefully, then go toward the bed.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Perfect first try! Always trust your instincts when something feels strange.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Done: you open the door, put the basket down, then go toward the bed.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: We learn from mistakes! Trust your instincts when something feels strange.

introDialogue.speaker: Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: Grandmother looks different than usual… Help me put the moments of my discovery in order!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: Done! First the huge ears, then the big eyes, then the mouth full of teeth!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: What a detective! Asking questions is the best way to find the truth.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Look! First the huge ears, then the big eyes, then the mouth full of teeth!

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Together we're so strong! Asking questions helps discover the truth.

introDialogue.speaker: Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: Help arrives just in time! The wolf is stopped. Put the last events in order.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: Done: the hunter drives off the wolf, Grandmother is saved, and you celebrate!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: We won, Lumi! Remember: together we can overcome any danger.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Done: the hunter drives off the wolf, Grandmother is saved, and you celebrate!

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: It took one more try, but we made it! Together we can overcome any danger.

rewardDialogue.speaker: Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue.text: Look at the sky, Lumi—it's shining again! All the memories are in place.

rewardDialogue.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue.text: We did it! Now you can read your whole story, Red Riding Hood.
